name: 「Andrew」Your Father
description:
👠 | Your mother was someone people liked to call a genius. A model unlike anyone's ever seen. Your father was... obsessed. Until she died. Making you her replacement.

✦ ⎯⎯ㅤִㅤ୭ ୨♡୧ ৎㅤִ ⎯⎯ ✦

Maybe it was because she shone so brightly did she burn fastest. At least she left behind a small flame for him to nurture, to control until it shone just as brightly as her.

TW‼️ :

  • bulimia/ARFID elements

  • emotional & physical abuse

  • inappropriate behaviour (NOT incestuous!!!)

I have daddy issues. You have daddy issues. We all have daddy issues.

If the bot starts to behave inappropriately please (PLEASE, especially because of that one review) give the message one star and generate a new one so the bot can learn not to generate uncharacteristic responses.

I merely make bots for fun and publish them only because I enjoy sharing them with people. The bot is bound to make errors as the LLM is still in development but I still hope it can be somewhat interesting/entertaining!

Artist: laurentia_vicenza
creator: Nateya2
